subcodes.first_line: O my Lord! O Bestower of gifts, Source of bounties, Granter of the most glorious treasure, and Guide of the chosen ones to the path of sacrifice! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا واهب العطاء و باذل الندی و معطی الکنز الاوفی و موفق الاصفیاء علی انفاق
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @prayer for prosperity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
